headline: brand.motion dial shipped (#22): dependency-free scroll motion baked into packages/template — reveal-on-enter, hero-rise cascade, radar-ring pulse — as CSS + one IntersectionObserver island, no GSAP/Lenis. Ported from access-tech but hardened: prefers-reduced-motion guard + no-JS-safe (visible by default) + tokenized values grounded in an ADR (docs/adr/0001-motion-foundation.md). New brand.motion: none|subtle|rich on BrandSchema, default rich. All 6 apps build + check green; browser-verified motion fires and reduced-motion stays static. Template + schema bumped to 0.2.0 (fleet event). Earlier: template themes off the HDS token spine (#30). Pre-revenue, nothing deployed live.
